title: PESO Configuration
description: Configuration file for PESO (Prompt Engineering Smart Optimizer)

shortPromptThreshold.description: Minimum prompt length (words) to trigger enhancement

mode.description: Tool selection strategy: 'manual' (use prefer/avoid lists) or 'mcp-first' (auto-prefer MCP tools)

notes.description: Optional documentation for tool priority decisions

enabled.description: 'all' to enable all techniques, or array of specific technique IDs

disabled.description: Array of technique IDs to explicitly disable (even if 'enabled' is 'all')

injectGitBranch.description: Include current git branch in context

injectGitChangedFiles.description: Include list of changed files (git status) in context

injectGitLastCommit.description: Include last commit message in context

injectMcpTools.description: Include available MCP tools in context

injectProjectInstructions.description: Include project instruction files (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.) in context

maxChangedFiles.description: Maximum number of changed files to include when injectGitChangedFiles is true

baseURL.description: Override LLM API base URL (supports {env:VAR} template for environment variables)

apiKey.description: Override LLM API key (supports {env:VAR} template for environment variables)

options.description: Optional overrides for CLI/HTTP fallback path (plugin mode uses OpenCode SDK auth)
